name_en: Bottega Veneta 24 Spring Fashion Woven Evening Bag No Logo, Shining Anyway. This evening bag features gorgeous colors and eye-catching appeal, while the petal craftsmanship reveals the thriving energy of spring
name_cn:
Bottega Veneta 24 Spring Fashion Woven Evening Bag No Logo, Shining Anyway. This evening bag features gorgeous colors and eye-catching appeal, while the petal craftsmanship reveals the thriving energy of spring
 Original leather + stainless steel hardware + 24k gold plating + fully handmade
Those who know our brand history should have heard of the knot, which is a story of Bottega Veneta and one of its important designs, a perfect style
Style No.: 717622
Size: 20.5*6*12.5
